compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section for worktree isolation workflow
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to describe the worktree isolation flow:
- Dispatch with isolation:worktree → implement in worktree → serial review in worktree → commit in worktree → merge to session branch
- worktree.isolation_enabled config key (default: true, fallback: shared-directory)
- Reference to shared worktree-dispatch.md prompt

Also update dso-config.conf reference section to document worktree.isolation_enabled key.

### Files to modify
- CLAUDE.md (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)
- .claude/dso-config.conf (EDIT — add documentation comment for worktree.isolation_enabled)

### TDD Exemption
Unit test exemption — criterion 3: static documentation files, no conditional logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md describes worktree isolation flow
  Verify: grep -qi 'worktree.*isolation\|isolation.*worktree' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions worktree.isolation_enabled
  Verify: grep -q 'worktree.isolation_enabled' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] dso-config.conf has documentation for the key
  Verify: grep -q 'worktree.isolation' .claude/dso-config.conf

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read CLAUDE.md architecture section and dso-config.conf ✓

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Implementation complete — CLAUDE.md updated with worktree isolation description and worktree.isolation_enabled config key reference ✓

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 3 acceptance criteria verified: (1) CLAUDE.md describes worktree isolation flow, (2) CLAUDE.md mentions worktree.isolation_enabled, (3) dso-config.conf already had documentation comment for worktree.isolation_enabled (lines 87-91, no edit needed)
